name: Arroz Con Queso/Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the raw rice according to package instructions.
2. Mash the whole tomatoes (4-oz) and drain any liquid.
3. Convert the Mexican style beans (4-oz) into a mashed consistency.
4. Finely chop the onion.
5. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
7. Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened.
8. Stir in the cooked rice, mashed tomatoes, mashed beans, and cottage cheese.
9. Combine all ingredients thoroughly except for 1 cup of the grated Monterey Jack cheese.
10. Transfer the mixture into a well-greased crockpot.
11. Cover and cook on low setting for 6 to 9 hours.
12. Just before serving, sprinkle the reserved grated Monterey Jack cheese over the top.
